steps.title: Check the ratios
steps.content:
The table values have a constant multiplicative pattern.
$$1\div\frac{1}{69}=69$$
$$69\div1=69$$
$$4{,}761\div69=69$$

steps.title: Classify the pattern
steps.content: A constant ratio means the function is exponential, not linear. Since the ratio is $69$, which is greater than $1$, the function is increasing.

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: The table matches the exponential model $y=69^x$, showing an increasing exponential function. The answer is C.
